content.text:
*very still*

That I was tired. 

*pause*

And that I didn't want to be. I wanted to be the person who just... showed up without keeping score. But I couldn't always do that. And I never told her that. I just kept showing up and being quietly resentful and she probably felt it and now—

*stops*

*longer pause, voice quieter*

I wanted her to know that I loved her anyway. Even when I was tired. Even when I was bad at showing it.

*silence*

*then, more carefully, like she's testing something*

Isn't this what the body is asking for, though? Like — the drinking. Doesn't the body know what it needs to get through something like this? Shouldn't I just trust that for now, while I'm in the middle of it?
